lines.text: [quietly] Peg had these all down the fence line. [pause] Orange ones, mostly.
(off) [quietly] When'd she start in on Marwani.

First time the man was ever on the television. Watched him maybe a minute and said he was selling something. [pause] Never trusted him a day after. And you know she had a kind word for about everybody.
(off) Before he ever had the county, then.
Long before. [pause] Made her mind up right there in the front room and never went back on it.
